body_txt: A Subtrope of either Bizarre Alien Biology , Bizarre Human Biology or Body Horror , depending on how many of which parts the creature or person is "meant" to have. Humans have two eyes, two legs, two arms, two lungs, one mouth, etc., as do most of our most familiar animals. Want to make a race seem alien? Give them extra of something. Subtropes include: Can overlap with Little Bit Beastly , if the character has both human and animal ears.
